narrative:
Bellevue City 1-A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 907 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
